---
id: concur-payer-sdk
title: "Concur Payer View"
description: "When `setupPreload` object is used and the state of the transaction is `created`, calling this endpoint will update the transaction state to `pending`."
sidebar_label: "Concur Payer View"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/developers/apis/ottu-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Concur Payer View"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/b/checkout/api/sdk/v1/concur-payer-view/{session_id}/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



When `setupPreload` object is used and the state of the transaction is `created`, calling this endpoint will update the transaction state to `pending`.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
